description: The Chosen Few Motorcycle Club is the first mixed-race 1%er outlaw motorcycle club, founded around 1959 in Los Angeles, California by Lionel Ricks and others. It has chapters across the United States and internationally in the Philippines. The club is known for its outlaw status and diverse membership.

country_links.evidence_quote: chapters in ... Internationally in the Philippines.
country_links.context: The Chosen Few MC has chapters in the Philippines.
